title: [lora_l2.c:517-525] LoRa config parameters not validated against board capabilities
description:
Completeness: Build configuration category.

At lines 517-525, the lora_modem_config uses fixed values:
- bandwidth = BW_125_KHZ
- datarate = SF_10  
- coding_rate = CR_4_5
- frequency = CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_FREQUENCY
- tx_power = CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_TX_POWER

CONFIG values are Kconfig-validated, but the hardcoded SF10/BW125/CR4-5 are not.

Different LoRa modules have different capabilities:
- sx1276/77/78/79: SF6-12, BW7.8-500kHz
- sx1261/62: SF5-12, BW7.8-500kHz
- llcc68: SF5-11 only (no SF12)

If a board uses llcc68 and this code requests SF12, lora_config() will fail. But the error message at line 529 just says 'LoRa config failed' without indicating which parameter was rejected.

Consider adding BUILD_ASSERT or Kconfig constraints to validate SF/BW compatibility with selected radio, or provide more specific error handling.
close_reason: Fixed: added comment documenting radio capability differences and improved error message
